---
title: "Journey Title"
subtitle: "A short sentence describing why this place mattered."
date: YYYY-MM-DD

location: ""
coordinates:
  latitude:
  longitude:

themes:
  - ""

related-projects:
  - ""

related-essays:
  - ""

related-journeys:
  - ""

hero-image: ""

format:
  html:
    css: ../assets/css/custom.css
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.journey-hero}

![](../assets/images/journeys/placeholder.jpg){.journey-hero-image}

# {{< meta title >}}

::: {.journey-subtitle}
{{< meta subtitle >}}
:::

::: {.journey-meta}
**{{< meta date >}} · {{< meta location >}}**
:::

:::

---

::: {.journey-story}

Your story begins here.

Write naturally.

Do not divide the story into sections such as *Before I Arrived* or *What I Observed*.

Let the narrative unfold the way you experienced it.

Images can appear naturally throughout the story whenever they help the reader enter the place.

:::

---

::: {.journey-gallery}

<!-- Optional -->

![](../assets/images/journeys/placeholder.jpg)

![](../assets/images/journeys/placeholder.jpg)

![](../assets/images/journeys/placeholder.jpg)

:::

---

## Reflection

One or two paragraphs.

Not a summary.

Instead, describe how this place changed the way you think.

---

## Related Ideas

- Thinking Across Scales
- Political Ecology
- Ecological Accounting

---

## Related Journeys

- Everglades
- Hainan
- Inner Mongolia

---
